label: initial_restriction
detail: Rapid weight loss 262→210. Cereal (Cheerios, Crispix, Frosted Flakes) + milk + Annie Chun's noodle bowls + romaine salads. 1700-2000 cal/day.

label: continued_loss
detail: 210→170. Same staples plus granola bars (Nature Valley dominant) + Gardein faux-meat products + frozen meals (Lean Cuisine). Calorie creeping up to ~2000.

label: maintenance_drift
detail: 170→185. Granola bars + mac & cheese (ETCH) + faux meat (Gardein, Morningstar) + Jif Whips peanut butter. More variety, calories 2000-2400.

label: regain_begins
detail: 185→190. Same foods but higher quantities. Joseph's pita bread + baba ghanouj + bean chili. Calories ~2100.

label: travel_binge_1
detail: Sep 2015 travel. Falafel, beer (Amstel, Efes), basmati rice. 3500 cal/day for 3 weeks.

label: post_travel_recomp
detail: 190→195. Brown rice + canola oil cooking era begins. Morningstar crumbles chili. Ben & Jerry's FroYo appears. Some restriction months (Feb-Mar 2016: 1600 cal).

label: sweet_earth_era
detail: 195→198. Sweet Earth bacon, Trader Joe's granola, Beyond Meat appears. Ben & Jerry's frequent.

label: gardein_maple_era
detail: 198→200. Gardein crispy tenders + maple syrup dominates (27×/month). Beyond Burger arrives Aug 2017. Quest protein bars. Pre-keto buildup.

label: high_protein_experiment
detail: Sudden protein push: Quest protein powder, avocado, Tofurky deli slices, almond milk. Protein 27%.

label: keto_phase_1
detail: First keto attempt. Palak paneer (Trader Joe's frozen), crispbread, pistachios, moon cheese. Fat 60%+ carb 16-21%.

label: keto_phase_2
detail: Sustained keto. Quest cookies, Quest BBQ chips, Hail Merry tarts, keto chili, Lily's chocolate. Heavy sugar-alcohol products.

label: enlightened_era
detail: Post-keto. Enlightened ice cream bars (Chocolate Peanut Butter: up to 34×/month) + Chocorite candy (PB cups, pecan clusters, coconut almond) dominate. Avocado regular. ChocZero chocolate syrup. Quest pizzas. 2000-2200 cal.

label: travel_binge_2
detail: Jun 2019 travel. Amstel beer, baklava, cashews, KitKat. 2539 cal/day.

label: post_travel_restriction
detail: Back to Enlightened + Chocorite. PB cup cheesecake (homemade). Avocado + taco shells. 1600-1800 cal.

label: weekend_fasting
detail: Seven consecutive Sat-Sun 36-hour fasts (<200 cal). Weekday eating normal ~2400 cal. Weight cycling 208-215.

label: pre_covid
detail: Holiday spike (Dec 2479). Then Chocorite dominant. Homemade baking appears (orange sweet rolls, strawberry bread, brownies). COVID transition.

label: covid_lockdown
detail: COVID year. Chocorite PB cups + Enlightened bars continue. Fritos chili cheese. Deep Malai Kofta (frozen Indian). Pina colada recipe. Homemade baking (mint chocolate PB rolls, cheesecake bars). 1800-2300 cal.

label: slate_chocolate_milk_era
detail: Slate dark chocolate milk dominates (20-30×/month for 2 years). Homemade baking regular (scones, cheesecake, key lime pie, orange tofu). Coffee becomes a staple. Chocorite continues. 2000-2350 cal. Weight 210→220.

label: potato_diet_1
detail: 13 days. 500g potato × 2 + olive/avocado oil. 1500-2200 cal/day. 45-61% potato by calories.

label: potato_diet_2
detail: ~12 potato days (every 2-3 days). 500g potato × 2 + olive oil + Better Bagel + cream cheese. ~1500 cal.

label: post_potato_plateau
detail: Return to normal eating. Weight 220-225.

label: low_protein_experiment
detail: Low protein period (45g/day, 8%). Weight 222-226.

label: potato_diet_3
detail: 6 days. Boiled potato 500g × 3 + olive oil. 1674-2223 cal. 74-77% potato. Purest attempt.

label: pre_tirzepatide_baseline_1
detail: Return to normal eating. Weight 225-230.

label: potato_diet_4
detail: 9 days. Yukon Gold 1 lb × 4 + Kerrygold butter + heavy cream + vodka. 1779-2126 cal. 62-75% potato.

label: pre_tirzepatide_baseline_2
detail: Final pre-drug period. Weight 225-230.

label: tirzepatide_era
detail: GLP-1 agonist. Dose escalation 2.5→12.5mg. Weight 225→203. Intake drops 456 cal/day. Binge rate 12.2%→3.4%.
